description_long: This object is a handheld gaming console with a clamshell design, featuring two screens: a larger upper display and a smaller lower touchscreen. The upper screen displays a colorful game interface, while the lower screen shows a menu with various icons. The device is predominantly black with a glossy finish, and it includes several physical controls: a circular joystick, a directional pad, and multiple buttons labeled SELECT, HOME, START, and POWER. The hinge mechanism allows the device to open and close, and the exterior of the upper half has two small camera lenses. The overall build appears compact and portable, suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A black clamshell handheld gaming console with dual screens, physical controls, and a glossy finish. Features include a joystick, buttons, and dual cameras on the lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing both screens, physical controls, and game interface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness, hinge, and joystick placement.
description_view_2: Rear view of the closed lid, showing dual camera lenses and a smooth surface.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the button layout and hinge structure.
